word: G89 - ἀδιαλείπτως - adialeíptōs - ad-ee-al-ipe'-toce - Without ceasing

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀδιαλείπτως

- Transliteration: Adialeiptos

- Phonetic: ad-ee-al-ipe'-toce

- Definition:

1. without intermission, incessantly, without ceasing

- Origin: from G88

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G88; uninterruptedly that is without omission (on an appropriate occasion): - without ceasing.
